name: Paulo Wood Writing Desk with Drawer - Threshold™
description:
Maintain your modern style with the Paulo Wood Writing Desk with Drawer from Threshold™. This writing desk has one drawer for storing writing materials and other office supplies and keeping the tabletop clutter-free. The narrow style is perfect for smaller spaces to make the most of the room you have.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Tabletop Depth: 20.00 inches
Tabletop Width: 42.01 inches
Overall Height: 29.95 inches
Drawer Width: 33.78 inches
Drawer Depth: 14.85 inches
Drawer Height: 1.67 inches
Distance from Floor to Bottom of Drawer: 25.27 inches
Max Drawer Weight: 25 lbs
Max Top Panel Weight: 75 lbs
